Placements
Placement Highlights
Our Engineering College is one of the esteemed institute in Thane district. We at SSJCOE Dombivli, are working hard to build enthusiastic and energetic engineers who are always ready to take challenges and tackle them. Our Training & Placement cell (T&P) guides clear career path to the students. It caters to the industrial training needs of students and also provides placement opportunities to them through campus interviews. It also motivates and prepares students for the interviews in prospective workplaces.

Information Technology
Information Technology
Introduction
Faculties
Facilities
Events
Syllabus
Academic Calender
Introduction
On behalf of the faculty, staff, and students of the Department of Information Technology SSJCOE, Dombivli, I, Prof. Dr. Savita Sangam welcome you all to our department. I am happy to lead the department established in 1999 having a glorious history of 24 years. The department conducts under-graduate and Honours certification programmes.
Information Technology and Computer Engineering fields have revolutionized the way we communicate, work, and live our daily lives. With the rapid advancements in technology, the demand for skilled professionals in these fields continues to grow exponentially. Over the years, the department has established the infrastructure and capabilities necessary to meet the demands of business, academia, and students. The Department’s highly skilled and experienced faculty members are dedicated to providing the quality education through the implementation of minor/major projects, well-planned theory lessons, and practical sessions.
We hold several activities that nurture our pupils’ overall growth.
We have cutting-edge buildings with fully functional laboratories and other equipment to support our students’ educational needs. We promote student participation in technical conferences, project competitions, and other events at the college and university levels and offer support. The department is dedicated to delivering quality education and achieving excellence through systematic efforts of faculty and students.
We want all of our students to succeed in their careers and wish them happiness and success as they take on new responsibilities in their lives.

Computer Engineering
Computer Engineering
Introduction
Faculties
Facilities
Events
Syllabus
Academics calender
Introduction
The Department of Computer Engineering runs an undergraduate degree program (BE) which is established in the year 1994 with initial intake of 60. Over the years, the department has progressed continuously and currently offering 90 seats for UG program. Department emphases on teaching students various core subjects related design, development and maintenance of computer systems (Hardware concept) and design and development of algorithm and programming (software). To satisfy today’s demand, some emerging techniques like machine learning, AI, Cyber security are also included in the curriculum as compulsory and elective subject. Department also offer honours degree subjects.
By providing our students with cutting-edge facilities and highly skilled, experienced, and motivated faculty, our objective is to empower them in the fields of computer engineering.
Students are also given ample opportunities of internships and research activities like technical report writing, publishing research papers throughout their bachelor program.
Through many departmental collaborations, guest lectures, seminars by industry experts, technical workshops organised by professional bodies, and other means, students are properly exposed to both soft and technical skills necessary to meet the demands of the industry.
The department encourages students to participate in technical activities like hackathons, coding and project competitions, poster presentation and extra-curricular activities like inter college’s sports & cultural competitions.

Mechanical Engineering
Mechanical Engineering
Introduction
Faculties
Facilities
Events
Syllabus
Academic Calender
Introduction
The Department of Mechanical Engineering was established in 1998 for the undergraduate course with an intake of 60. The department has well-equipped laboratories and a CAD cam lab with 3D modelling and computational software. The department has a well-equipped huge work-shop. The department has well well-established library having no reference books for students and faculty.
Department student chapter MESA (Mechanical Engg Student Association) organized different technical event activities. The Department of Mechanical Engineering have MOUs with leading and reputed industries like CEMS, Republic Motors, Cad Centre, Volmet, MECH-INS etc. Every year students participate in different indoor and outdoor sports.
The department has registered membership with different professional bodies like ISME, and ISHRAE- Thane chapter. The experienced faculty and staff of the department made remarkable strides by involving themselves in various activities like FDP, STTP, and Project Competition. Faculties have grabbed the research grants from the University of Mumbai.
For the all-round development of the students, various expert lectures/ workshops, ADD-ON programs/industrial visits, and Value Added Programs are organized in various areas of Mechanical Engineering. The department provides Internship courses for the Third-year and Final-year students. Many companies like Connect Well Pvt Ltd, Lloyd Steel Pvt Ltd, Kilburn Engg Pvt ltd, Godrej, Amar Raja Pvt Ltd, and Bharat Bijli Ltd repute Conduct campus placement. The department has placed more than 50% of Campus placement students with good packages.30% of students from the Final year pass out batches going for Higher Education every year.

Electronics & Telecommunication
Electronics & Telecommunication
Introduction
Faculties
Facilities
Events
Syllabus
Academic Calender
Introduction
Establishment Year- 1994
Sanctioned Intake- 60
The Branch of Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering, caters to the use of sophisticated machinery and Electronic processes in order to create cutting-edge communication systems that can process data at incredibly lightning speeds. These days, nearly every aspect of our lives is impacted by the field of Electronics and Telecommunication. From the mobile phones, to digital gadgets which we use in our day-to-day life come under the broader category of Electronics and Communication.
One of the biggest contributions of Electronics to human society is the availability of affordable communication products, which are essential to our everyday life. Consumer gadgets, computer technology, and Telecommunications are all developing at a rapid rate these days. Every new technological advancement, including the internet, mobile phones, smart televisions, satellite communications, radio, and telephone, have completely changed how we live and perceive the world.
New technologies are always being developed; 5G phones, for example, allow users to watch high-definition video in real time whereas research on 6G and 7G technologies are underway. Technological advancements in Electronics and telecommunications have fuelled all of these developments.
Department of Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering at SSJCOE, Dombivli (E) is established with well-equipped laboratories and computer facilities. These laboratories provide platform for learning not only theory but also practical and simulation aspects of Electronics and Communication Engineering.
To inculcate knowledge into students the department organises Expert lectures, Add-On programs, Project competitions, National Science Day Competition, Oscilla

Chemical Engineering
Chemical Engineering
Introduction
Faculties
Facilities
Events
Syllabus
Academic Calender
Introduction
The department of chemical engineering started its meritorious journey in 1994, with the objective of moulding young minds with outstanding excellence in the field of chemical engineering and technology. The department has always been on a high growth path that has experienced and dedicated faculty with strong commitment to engineering education who work with zeal and enthusiasm to provide a vibrant and optimum learning environment.
The periodically updated curriculum imparts technical knowledge to the student and the application based environment in the state of art laboratories compliments the same. The students are motivated to participate in paper presentation, workshops and seminars that are essential to maintaining proficiency. Right from the beginning, the department has emphasised on supporting and guiding students in making smarter career decisions by providing professional guidance and connecting them with prospective employers. A large percentage of students also quality respective competative exams for perusing higher studies in India and abroad.
In keeping with the department vision, the holistic development of the students is focused upon that instils a habit of continued learning and sense of responsibility in them to contribute towards the betterment of society.
Faculties
To impart quality technical education for creating competent and ethically strong professional in the Chemical Engineering Department with capabilities of accepting new challenges.

AI & Machine Learning
AI & Machine Learning
Introduction
Faculties
Facilities
Events
Syllabus
Academic Calender
Introduction
Welcome to
the Department of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning department established in AY 2021-22 has an intake of 30 students.Our faculty members are leading experts in their fields, bringing together expertise from computer science, mathematics, engineering, and beyond. The department has fully equipped laboratories with modern and sophisticated equipment.
An era where technology is evolving at an unprecedented pace, the demand for professionals skilled in artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) is soaring. Our department is dedicated to exploring the vast potential of artificial intelligence and machine learning to revolutionize industries, solve complex problems, and shape the future of our world.
We offer a comprehensive curriculum designed to equip students with the knowledge and skills needed to tackle real-world challenges using AI and ML techniques. In addition to a state-of-the-art curriculum, the Department places a strong emphasis on enriching the students’ learning experience by offering value-added courses, skill-development programs, and opportunities to participate in technical competitions, coding competitions and hackathons at all levels. The Computer Society of India Student Chapter has been established, which actively engages students in knowledge sharing, technology, and skill up-gradation. Student’s forum aptly named “AMSA” provides a platform for students to exhibit their talent in technical as well as cultural activities.
The Department offers Honors Degree program, designed to provide exceptional students with an enriched academic experience and a pathway to further success in their careers. We encourage research through technical paper publication in various reputed conferenc

Leadership
Visionary leaders guiding the institution towards excellence
Hon.  President
Mr. Sagar Shivajirao Jondhale
Read more
Honorable President
Mr. Sagar Shivajirao Jondhale
"Education is not the Amount of Information that you brain, It must have man making, character making & life building assimilation of ideas, then only, by means of that education, something can be gained in the world. Most probably, students & parents are most."
He is an Eminent Educationalist & Entrepreneur. Civil Engineer, Social Activist, Meditator, Hobby - Trekker & Sailor. He has been a guiding light of the Institution from past more than 2 decades.
He is a Managing Trustee & Director of Jondhale Educational Group which was founded in 1960 under which there are 27 Institutions which includes State Board Schools, International Schools, Junior/Senior Colleges, Polytechnics, Engineering, Law & MBA Colleges.
He initiated an International Joint Venture of Implementation of “Consciousness based Education” with Maharishi Vedic University, Natherlands - Europe and America. With more than 3500 Yogic Flyers in their Campus, and glad to be the only school in India persuing consciousness based education which was also appreciated by Japanese Prime Minister - Hon. Mr. Yukio Hatoyama’s personal visit at our Campus to experience mediation with 3500 Yogic Flyers and to understand “Consciousness based Education” program.
He has been conferred with several recognition and awards from eminent personalities of high repute, for his contribution in the field of Education and other Social Activities. Predetermining the initial treat of Covid 19 Pandemic, He filed a “Public Interest Litigation” in Mumbai High Court on 16th March 2020 before the Chief Justice, after which his 25 point suggestions which includes - COMPLETE LOCKDOWN, which were then been given to the state for Implementation.
Astrooworld
India’s Biggest Spiritual, Holistic & Wellness

About Our Institution
Years of Experience
0
+
Shaping Engineers Since 1994
Discover the legacy, vision, and excellence that define Shivajirao S. Jondhale College of Engineering
Shivajirao S. Jondhale College of Engineering (SSJCOE) was established in 1994 by the Samarth Samaj with a vision to provide quality technical education to students in the Dombivli region and beyond. Recognizing the growing need for engineering education in the rapidly developing area, the institution was founded with the mission to create technically competent professionals with strong ethical values.
Spread across 17 acres of lush green campus, SSJCOE offers state-of-the-art infrastructure with well-equipped laboratories, modern classrooms, a central library with extensive resources, and excellent sports facilities. The college is approved by AICTE, New Delhi, recognized by DTE, Government of Maharashtra, and affiliated to Mumbai University.
Our institution takes pride in its NAAC accreditation, which stands as a testament to our commitment to quality education. With a focus on holistic development, we nurture innovation, research, and entrepreneurship among our students, preparing them to meet the challenges of the dynamic engineering landscape.
30+

About Library
Institute has a well-furnished central library with reading room capacity of more than 100 seats and adequate facilities like air-conditioning, drinking water and ladies & gents toilets. Multimedia PCs are available in library to access E-journals, research papers, E-books etc.
About Library
Institute has a well-furnished central library with reading room capacity of more than 100 seats
and adequate facilities like air-conditioning, drinking water and ladies & gents toilets. Multimedia PCs are available in library to access E-journals, research papers, E-books etc.
Internet speed of 300 mbps is available for internet access. There are 10 multimedia PCs with internet access available for students as well as staff. Facility of copier and printer is also available.
Our institute has subscription for the e-resources like- DELNET, J-Gate and NDLI club membership through which students can avail remote access to these e-resources. J-Gate Librarian
Portal is available for access.
Our institute has ERP facility for students and staff since 2018. It includes different modules for
management of book database. Library Management System software E-Granthalaya is purchased
recently. It is used to manage daily activities of library like book entries, book issue and return.
There are different modules for day-to-day library activities like full cataloging, accession register
etc. College has taken Delnet membership for being a member of a centralized library.
